name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Virtualization Activities
notes: This Building Block defines suspicious virtualization activities.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Medium or High Severity Virtualization Events
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Virtualization Activities on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following Suspicious Number of Modifications Made on Virtual Machines, Suspicious Number of Virtual Machines Created, Credential Exfiltration and Administration Task from the Same User, Multiple Sensitive Virtual Machines Deleted within Short Period of Time, Multiple Virtual Security Devices Powered Off within Short Period of Time, Sensitive Virtual Machines Unavailable for a Long Period of Time, Volume Attached and Detached on Different Machines, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Medium or High Severity Virtualization Events
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Virtualization Activities on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following Suspicious Number of Modifications Made on Virtual Machines, Suspicious Number of Virtual Machines Created, Credential Exfiltration and Administration Task from the Same User, Multiple Sensitive Virtual Machines Deleted within Short Period of Time, Multiple Virtual Security Devices Powered Off within Short Period of Time, Sensitive Virtual Machines Unavailable for a Long Period of Time, Volume Attached and Detached on Different Machines, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Medium or High Severity Virtualization Events
